listeners.purpose: Refuses the Branch archive when any facility referencing it still has status='active'. Fires a domain-level refusal event; the branch module surfaces the error as `BRANCH_HAS_ACTIVE_FACILITIES` (409). Distinct from the FK CASCADE — we intentionally block, not cascade, because facility retirement is a deliberate ops decision.

Cascades: finds every resource_booking with facility_id = event.facility_id AND status IN ('pending','confirmed') AND starts_at > now(), fires BookingCancelled per booking with cascade_trigger='facility_retired'. Runs at priority 50 (before notification-tier listeners) so the notification fan-out sees the cancelled state.

For the new blackout window: finds bookings that overlap, cancels each with cascade_trigger='facility_blackout'. Payload.affected_booking_count is populated by this listener so the audit row + operator dashboard shows impact.
Schedules SendBookingReminderJob for (booking.starts_at - 24h) and (booking.starts_at - 1h). Skips scheduling when starts_at is already past the reminder threshold (short-notice bookings).
Wave 4 bridge. When a Membership is terminated, revoke every associated Pass with revocation_reason='membership_terminated'. Placeholder listener in Wave 2 (Finance module lands in Wave 4).

Cascade delete via FK; this listener writes the compliance audit trail entry + emits count metrics (facilities purged, bookings purged, day_passes purged, passes purged). Financial-record retention still applies to the audit rows, which outlive the source rows.

When a region is paused, mark every facility in every branch in that region as status='maintenance' (soft-freeze — active bookings survive, new ones refused). Reverses on RegionResumed via ThawNewBookingsInRegion.

Reverses FreezeNewBookingsInRegion. Only unfreezes facilities that were frozen BY the RegionPaused cascade (checks metadata.frozen_by='region_pause' to avoid unfreezing ones explicitly paused by ops).
